LOS.claimArea: Baggage Claim is on the ground floor, carousels A-D. Most domestic bags arrive within 20 minutes.
LOS.lostAndFound: Go to the airline's desk near carousel A. If unattended call +234 1 234 567898.

ABJ.claimArea: Domestic arrivals use carousels 1-3 in the new terminal. Bags usually take 15 minutes.
ABJ.lostAndFound: Report to the airline office opposite carousel 2.
